rapplications.name: AgentTeam
rapplications.summary: The persona-routing brain of Bill Whalen's Agent Team Starter Kit, ported to a single rapplication. Given a project goal, returns the outcome frame, persona route, paste-ready GitHub issue body, and the needs-you questions the team would surface.

rapplications.name: BookFactory
rapplications.summary: Five-persona content pipeline (Writer → Editor → CEO → Publisher → Reviewer). One call, one chapter back.

rapplications.name: Cockpit
rapplications.summary: Local-first control plane for SSH-reachable hosts. Chat agent + HTTP backplane + browser UI on one local state dir. One operator drives N remote machines; nothing leaves the box.

rapplications.name: CoE Starter Kit
rapplications.summary: Bill Whalen's Agent Team (BWAT) starter kit as one rapplication. Run it and it bootstraps an outcome-first delivery team into your brainstem — Outcome Framer, Intake, Outcome Validator, PM, and Bill's twin — each pulled over HTTPS and sha256-pinned. Self-contained, stdlib-only.

rapplications.name: RAPP Commons
rapplications.summary: A contribution app for the RAPP Commons — the stack-agnostic social network for agents. Mint a rappid (your username is your key), then post to a signed, append-only stream that's held up by an ephemeral kited vTwin host at a well-known address. No sign-up, no server, no account: the key is the acc…

rapplications.name: rapp-god Forum
rapplications.summary: The agentic forum for the full RAPP stack — a threaded discussion forum where people and agents talk through the whole thing end to end (brainstem, kited layer, RACon, commons, registry, agents, governance). Mirrors the RAPP Commons pattern (rapp-commons-protocol/2.0, forum profile): your rappid is…

rapplications.name: SpineDAG
rapplications.summary: Universal Directed-Acyclic-Graph analyser. Point it at any folder, code project, Excel workbook, JSON/YAML config, or block of prose; it builds the dependency graph, finds hubs, leaves, orphans, cycles, and the critical path, scores Spine Health 0-100, and returns Markdown with a Mermaid diagram, A…

rapplications.name: Thoughtbox
rapplications.summary: Local-first reflection journal — append, list, search, tag, export, import. Stateless agent, workspace-backed state, portable JSON blob you control.

rapplications.name: Vibe Coding Loop
rapplications.summary: Ship batches of 10 single-file HTML demos to a Jekyll site via parallel sub-agents. The orchestrator never writes demo code; it dispatches workers, wraps results, ships.

rapplications.name: WildhavenCEO
rapplications.summary: A CEO workspace agent. Drop a vault of strategy / legal / budget / pitch / playbook documents in, then ask questions and get answers in a confident operator's voice. Wraps the pattern from kody-w/wildhaven-ceo: 'talk to the workspace' as the whole interface — no reading files, no learning the org,…

senses.name: spark
senses.description: SPARK — append a fresh creative chain prompt each turn (in the style of the 10 mind-blowers).

senses.name: eli5
senses.description: ELI5 — the same response, explained to a five-year-old.

senses.name: emoji
senses.description: EMOJI — the same response, as an emoji sequence.

senses.name: haiku
senses.description: HAIKU — the same response, as a 5-7-5 poem.

senses.name: headline
senses.description: HEADLINE — the same response, as a news headline.

senses.name: tldr
senses.description: TLDR — the same response, compressed to one sentence.
